modules.name: QueryArXiv
modules.description: A module for querying the ArXiv database and processing research paper data.

files.name: query_arxiv.py
files.description: Main script for querying ArXiv and processing results.

functions.name: get_args
functions.description: Parses command-line arguments for the script.

parameters.name: argv
parameters.description: List of command-line arguments. Defaults to None.

functions.name: construct_query_url
functions.description: Constructs the query URL for the ArXiv API based on provided parameters.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category of the paper. Defaults to None.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Keyword for the title. Defaults to None.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Keyword for the author. Defaults to None.

parameters.name: abstract
parameters.description: Keyword in the abstract. Defaults to None.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to fetch. Defaults to 10.

functions.name: fetch_data
functions.description: Fetches data from the ArXiv API using the constructed query URL.

parameters.name: query_url
parameters.description: The query URL to send the request to.

functions.name: process_entries
functions.description: Processes the XML entries from the ArXiv API response.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description: List of XML elements representing papers.

parameters.name: current_date
parameters.description: The current date for filtering papers.

parameters.name: recent_days
parameters.description: Number of recent days to filter papers.

functions.name: check_date
functions.description: Checks if a paper's publication date is within the specified recent days.

parameters.name: date_string
parameters.description: Publication date of the paper in string format.

parameters.name: recent_days
parameters.description: Number of recent days to filter papers.

functions.name: save_to_csv
functions.description: Saves the processed paper data to a CSV file.

parameters.name: papers
parameters.description: List of dictionaries containing paper information.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Path to the CSV file to save the data.

functions.name: print_results
functions.description: Prints the processed paper data to the console.

parameters.name: papers
parameters.description: List of dictionaries containing paper information.
